query: I'm building a custom date picker component in React with Radix primitives — can you make sure it's properly accessible with keyboard navigation and screen reader support?

add aria labels to all the icon buttons in my navbar component, they're just icons right now with no text

make this accessible — it's a card grid layout with clickable cards that expand to show details, built with Tailwind and React

help me optimize the bundle size of my React app, it's loading too slowly on mobile. maybe we need code splitting

deploy my Next.js app to Vercel and configure the custom domain with SSL
